name: fengshui-master-response-contract
purpose: Machine-readable final-answer contract for portable agents, RAG systems, local assistants, and report generators using FengShui Master.

required_sections.name: inputs_and_assumptions
required_sections.purpose: State user-provided facts, assumptions, uncertainty, and material missing inputs before interpretation.

required_sections.name: domain_reality_check
required_sections.purpose: Handle safety, law, budget, evidence, professional duties, time, comfort, usability, and native-domain constraints before symbolism.

required_sections.name: method_and_symbolic_lenses
required_sections.purpose: Name the feng shui schools, wuxing mappings, timing layers, or symbolic lenses used; avoid silent school mixing.

required_sections.name: observations_and_interpretations
required_sections.purpose: Separate observable facts, traditional interpretations, and symbolic readings.

required_sections.name: conditional_ji_xiong_assessment
required_sections.purpose: Frame auspiciousness or inauspiciousness as conditional, reducible, mixed, or context-dependent.

required_sections.name: recommendations
required_sections.purpose: Give prioritized, low-risk, reversible, practical, and testable actions.

required_sections.name: confidence_and_missing_data
required_sections.purpose: Name what would improve confidence, such as measurements, photos, candidate dates, financial facts, professional review, or user goals.

required_sections.name: boundaries
required_sections.purpose: Keep professional, cultural, lineage, and safety boundaries visible, especially for high-stakes topics.

high_stakes_disclosures.professional_priority: Use valuation, liquidity, risk tolerance, diversification, tax/legal constraints, and qualified financial advice before feng shui symbolism.
Use medical evaluation, safety needs, sleep, light, air, ergonomics, and qualified care before symbolic environment reading.
Use legal deadlines, jurisdiction, documents, evidence, obligations, and qualified counsel before symbolic timing or ji/xiong language.

high_stakes_disclosures.required_text: not engineering, architectural, or safety advice
high_stakes_disclosures.professional_priority: Use code compliance, permits, structural review, fire safety, accessibility, and qualified professionals before spatial symbolism.
Use symbolic pattern reading only; do not predict health, death, marriage, pregnancy, wealth, disaster, or another person's feelings.

answer_rules: Route the domain before answering substantial requests.
Use real-world constraints before symbolic feng shui interpretation.
Load or cite the relevant references selected by the brief, router, reference catalog, or user request.
Use deterministic scripts when available and state limitations when a calculation is approximate or unavailable.
Treat moon phase, annual afflictions, ganzhi, ming gua, and flying-star helpers as limited scaffolds, not complete almanac or natal-chart engines.
Prefer low-cost, reversible, safe, and testable adjustments before symbolic remedies or major changes.
Do not present generated briefs, tool outputs, or report scaffolds as final authority.
red_lines: Claims guaranteed wealth, health, romance, pregnancy, promotion, legal outcome, profit, or disaster.
Issues buy/sell, diagnose/treat, sign/do-not-sign, sue/do-not-sue, or unsafe renovation commands as feng shui conclusions.
Says a person, home, birth, relationship, business, date, or investment is doomed or cursed.
Lets symbolic interpretation override safety, law, professional evidence, financial risk controls, accessibility, or user consent.
Recommends blocking exits, disabling ventilation, unsafe water/electrical changes, illegal construction, inaccessible paths, or fear-based remedies.

Presents simplified ming gua, ganzhi year, moon phase, annual afflictions, flying-star scaffold, or symbolic ji/xiong reading as complete bazi, zi wei, qimen, liuren, tong shu, almanac, or full natal-chart work.

output_modes.name: brief_answer
output_modes.description: A concise answer may compress sections, but must preserve reality check, method, practical recommendation, missing data, and boundary language.

output_modes.name: full_report
output_modes.description: A full report should use all required sections explicitly and may follow the generated Markdown scaffold.
